examples: In this perspective, we have an image of the awesome power of the Deity himself thundering away behind every jot and tittle of Milton's great epic.
I forgot the tittle of the film.
Not once do any of these creatures disobey one jot or tittle of the laws of physics.
But she said some of the coverage of the reshuffle was "distorted" and focused on "tittle-tattle".
The Blues will not officially comment but BBC Sport understands Chelsea consider the reports as tittle-tattle.
